key_dungeons.name: Flooded Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The air around Flooded Barrow shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Flooded Barrow and claim the Moonstone Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.

game_log: Shiela: Can you help me? I'm the owner of the General Store, and the basement is infected with rats.Can you deal with them? They might be Giant Rats, I'm not sure. I'm a little scared of rats...
Shiela: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Rat's In the General Store': Kill the Rats - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Shiela: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +50 XP, +50 Gold

Eager: So... the dank dungeon to our north has a very bad smelling troll.... Do you think you can take care of that for us? I don't want to know the details, but our town treasurer has set aside a reward for you if you can clean that up.
Eager: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!

Find the Sword of Kings: The realm is in dire need of ones like yourselves. We have monsters roaming the countryside and the Sword of Kings has been buried deep in the Abyss in the mountains. Can you help the realm? Our people will reward you with great treasure.  [ENTER]
Find the Sword of Kings: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck!
